title: Reiden Johnson’s CV
text:
Computer Information Technology | Cybersecurity

reidenjohnson@gmail.com | LinkedIn  | Download PDF



Senior at BYU-Idaho with a focus on data, systems, and general IT.


Python, SQL, data analysis, Linux systems, APIs, and system troubleshooting



Understanding how systems work, improving efficiency, and solving real-world technical problems




2020 - 2026 Brigham Young University - Idaho

B.S. Computer Information Technology
Minor in Russian




2026 AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
2020 - 2026 Russian Language & Cultural Studies





2026 SQL-Spender – Python and SQLite expense tracker
2026 NetflixNavigator – Data analysis project using Pandas
2026 CurConvert – JavaScript currency converter using APIs
